name: Ensenada Chili Pot
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from beef; shake beef cubes with flour, chili powder, salt, and pepper in a plastic bag to coat well.
2. Brown the beef cubes, a few at a time, in shortening; remove and reserve.
3. Stir in onion and sauté for 5 minutes or until the onion is soft.
4. Spoon off any excess drippings; stir any remaining flour seasoning mixture into the pan.
5. Drain liquid from kidney beans and add to the pan; stir in tomatoes; bring to boiling; remove from heat.
6. Place beef in a slow cooker with tomato mixture; stir in kidney beans and corn; cover cooker.
7. Cook on low for 8 hours or on high for 4 hours.
8. Stir in pimiento and green chili peppers.
9. Spoon chili over rice in soup bowls. Top with shredded cheddar cheese.
